messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

Just wanted to give you a quick update on the backend migration:

- Progress: 80% complete
- Status: On track for Friday delivery

Everything is proceeding as planned. Let me know if you need any further details.

Best regards

content.delta: Done! I've sent the email to alice@example.com with the subject "Project Update" summarizing that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.
